items.summary: Listen to identify six German-speaking cities, then match car number plates to cities.
Write short dialogues about where five young people live and whether they like it.
Write numbers as words and digits, then listen and mark lottery and spoken numbers.
Complete -zehn/-zig number endings, then listen and choose the correct prices.
Listen and note four people's mobile numbers, then find hidden number words.
Present-tense conjugation table and gap-fills for the verbs sein, heißen and wohnen.
Fill in personal pronouns, match names to er/sie, and form questions.
Form questions, unscramble word-order sentences, answer, and fill prepositions in/bei/von.
Answer location questions and fill definite and possessive articles for family nouns.
Listening-response and pronunciation drills on names, age, siblings and where people live.
Memory game: cut-out cards with family have-sentences to match into pairs.
Cut-out sheet of sixteen identical card backs labeled Wortschatz Familie for the game.
Sentence-building game: cut-out question-word, verb and subject cards to form questions.
Cut-out sheet of card backs labeled Grammatik Wo? Wie? Wer? for the game.
Sentence-building game: colored subject, verb and complement cards to form statements.
Cut-out sheet of card backs labeled Grammatik Aussagesätze for the sentence game.
Syllable puzzle: cut-out syllable cards to reassemble into family and describing words.
Cut-out sheet of twenty-four identical Silbenrätsel card backs for the syllable game.
